heading: Online access of founding fathers documents
label: 2120 Online access of founding fathers documents
notes: Transfer of Funds, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–404, § 4(b)122 Stat. 4283Oct. 13, 2008“(1).—In generalThe Archivist of the United States, in the role as chairman of the National Historical Publications and Records Commission may enter into cooperative agreements pursuant to , United States Code, that involve the transfer of funds from the National Historical Publications and Records Commission to State and local governments, tribal governments, other public entities, educational institutions, or private nonprofit organizations for the public purpose of carrying out , United States Codes [sic].section 6305 of title 31section 2120 of title 44“(2).—ReportNot later than December 31st of each year, the Archivist of the United States shall submit to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform [now Committee on Oversight and Accountability] of the House of Representatives a report on the provisions, amount, and duration of each cooperative agreement entered into as authorized by paragraph (1) during the preceding fiscal year.”
